title: Pedilonum calcarium
taxonomy: Pedilonum calcarium is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It belongs to the genus Pedilonum. The classification of Pedilonum calcarium is within the order Gentianales. The family Rubiaceae, to which Pedilonum calcarium belongs, is one of the largest and most diverse groups of flowering plants. Pedilonum calcarium is native to Southeast Asia.

side_effects: Pedilonum calcarium is a plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its various properties, but its use may lead to some side effects.
